subject: [Shuning's Approval Needed] McCoy Toh | SIP Special Projects Team - Corporate, FTE, Associate, Regional Cross Border

content.answer:
Hi Shuning,

As aligned with Alice and C&B, we would like to kindly seek your approval
for below. Based on the below proposal, it is considered as Normal Offer:
1. Package pay position is *P50 to P75*

   - We would like to propose *S$5,500 - S$5,800 month, but will start the
   offer at the lower end*. As aligned with Emily, this is within the Assoc
   range for Cross Border
   - Candidate has received A ratings in all rounds, including final
   interviewer.
   - Based on interview and case performance, he has received strong
   feedback including his relevant PMO experiences, and ability to collaborate
   and drive results with the senior management across his rotations
   - Final interviewer has deemed him to be at SA capability despite having
   just 1.5 years of experience, but to bring him in as an Associate with the
   potential for fast track promotion within a year

· Based on interview and case performance, he has received strong feedback
including his relevant PMO experiences, and ability to collaborate and
drive results with the senior management across his rotations

*Interview Feedback:*
*Cui Wei, Senior Manager: A*

(=) overall very strong and good fit to the various project roles in SIP
team
(+) strong project management skills and track record; strong interest
shown in new business building; clear logic and communications
(+) researched on shopee and SIP extensively before the interview, serious
about the interview
(+) good intrinsic and business judgement



*Nicholas Lim, Assistant Manager: A*

(+) Experience fit the role well
(+) Strong logical thinking when answering questions and breaking down case
study
(+) Able to communicate well
(=) Interest in the role is high. When pushed to rank current
opportunities, Shopee was his first choice (tone + body language sounded
convincing)


Thank you.

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

He is the top candidate from the hiring team interview, receiving A grade
from the interviewer, although he is at associate level, we see potential
for him to fast-track to SA by mid-year 2024 if he joins us and performs
well.

We can standardize the proposed offer at P50 (SGD 5,500). Would this
proposal be okay with you?

*Emily Lin, 林佑容*
Shopee | People Team
